name: Moldova Open 2020

venue.name: [Moldova State University](http://usm.md/?lang=en)
venue.details: Faculty of Mathematics and Computer Science, 4th Building, room Sala de Lectura, second floor.

information:
This is the first WCA competition in Moldova since 2017. It is an open competition for all people of all ages and from all countries.
We hope many people from Moldova and other countries will participate.

The competition also counts as the national championship for Moldova.
So the best competitors from Moldova will be the national champions 2019 of Moldova.
